\[
I (e; y) = \mathbb {E} _ {p (e, y)} \left[ \log \frac {p (e , y)}{p (e) p (y)} \right] = \mathbb {E} _ {p (e, y)} \left[ \log \frac {p (y | e)}{p (y)} \right],
\]

\[
\mathbb {E} _ {p (x)} \left[ D _ {\mathrm {K L}} \left(p _ {\theta} (e \mid x) \| p _ {0} (e)\right) \right] = I (e; x) + D _ {\mathrm {K L}} \left(p _ {\theta} (e) \| p _ {0} (e)\right)
\]

\[
U _ {k} = \arg \max  _ {U \in \mathbb {R} ^ {d \times k}: U ^ {\top} U = I _ {k}} \operatorname {T r} \left(U ^ {\top} \Sigma U\right),
\]

\[
\hat {y} (x) = \sigma \Big (\underbrace {w _ {h} ^ {\top} z _ {H} (x) + b _ {h}} _ {\text {b a s e l o g i t}} + \underbrace {w _ {r} ^ {\top} z _ {R} (x) + b _ {r}} _ {\text {r e s i d u a l l o g i t}} \Big).
\]
